meta.title: Help Center - Frequently Asked Questions
meta.description: Answers to the most common questions about Atlas Services. How to find professionals, how to publish services, pricing, verification and more.

header.title: Help Center
header.subtitle: Everything you need to know about how to find and publish professional services

cta.title: Didn't find your answer?
cta.subtitle: Our team is available to help you

faqs.q: How do I find a professional near me?

a.text: To find a professional near you:

items: You'll see verified profiles with ratings, prices and direct contact

a.text: You can contact by WhatsApp or phone without intermediaries. All professionals are verified and have user reviews.

faqs.q: How much does it cost to post a service on Atlas Services?

a.text: Posting a service is completely FREE to start.
You just need to create an account and fill in the form with your trade. Optional Premium plans are available:
The Premium plan gives you search priority, Pro verification badge and 24/7 support.

faqs.q: Are professionals on Atlas Services verified?

a.text: Yes, all professionals are verified.
Each provider has:
Reviews are public and cannot be deleted. We also have the Atlas Guarantee which offers mediation in case of conflicts.

faqs.q: In which countries does Atlas Services operate?

a.text: Atlas Services operates in 5 countries:
You can filter services by state and city in each country's search.

faqs.q: I need an urgent professional, how do I contact one?

a.text: For emergencies:

items: Search for the type of professional on atlasservices.com
You'll see direct phone and WhatsApp numbers

a.text: Many professionals offer 24/7 emergency service. Premium profiles tend to respond faster. You can also contact multiple providers in parallel to find immediate availability.

faqs.q: Are there moving and freight services?

a.text: Yes, there are multiple moving and freight providers on Atlas Services.
They offer:
You can compare prices and see ratings before hiring.

faqs.q: What trades can I find on Atlas Services?

a.text: Available trades:
Total: 15+ categories of professional services

faqs.q: How does payment work on Atlas Services?

a.text: Atlas Services does NOT charge commissions or intermediate payments.
Payment is agreed directly between client and provider:

items: Agree on price and payment method (cash, transfer, etc.)
Pay directly to the provider after the work

a.text: We recommend paying after verifying the quality of the service.
The Atlas Guarantee is our mediation commitment.
If the service doesn't meet what was agreed:

items: Our team mediates between both parties
We seek a fair solution (refund, additional work, etc.)
The provider can be suspended if they don't respond

a.text: This guarantee applies to all services contracted through the platform.

faqs.q: What's the difference between a basic and Premium service?

a.text: Basic Services (FREE):
Premium Services:
Premium providers get up to 5x more clients according to our data.
To ensure the best experience and reward quality, services are shown in this priority order:

items: Premium Priority: Providers with an active plan always appear in the top positions.
Ratings: Within each level (Premium or Basic), professionals with better scores automatically move up.
Recency: In case of a tie in plan and score, we show the most recently published or updated services first.

a.text: Services without ratings appear at the bottom of their respective group. We encourage professionals to provide great service to climb the rankings!
